title: [PR] UI fixes, transcript enhancements, and codebase refactoring
summary:
## Summary

Major update covering transcript display enhancements, UI/UX fixes, performance improvements, and a comprehensive codebase refactoring pass.

### Transcript & Display
- **Sentence Highlight mode**: paragraph-grouped transcript display with per-segment time-based highlighting and tap-to-s

title: [PR] feat: add llama.cpp local LLM support via .env configuration
summary:
Add 'llamacpp' as a new provider for running TradingAgents fully offline with a local llama-server (llama.cpp).

Changes:
- factory.py: register 'llamacpp' provider alongside openai/ollama
- validators.py: accept any model name for llamacpp (like ollama)
- openai_client.py: llamacpp branch sets
